data.title: Hindustan Zinc signs MoU with Virginia Tech for Advanced Research on Silver Recovery
data.description: A new academic partnership in Udaipur, India seeks to improve metallurgical performance and boost scientific capabilities. Hindustan Zinc Limited, the global leader in zinc production and a top silver producer, is collaborating to achieve this goal. With a market presence on BSE (500188) and NSE (HINDZINC), the initiative aims to enhance industry standards and innovation.

data.title: AI discovers 22 Firefox flaws in 2 weeks. Claude Opus 4.6 spots 14 high-severity bugs, a fifth of 2025's critical fixes. Mozilla releases patches to millions.
data.description: Claude Opus 4.6 has discovered 14 high-severity bugs in Firefox, accounting for almost 20% of all critical vulnerabilities addressed in 2025. Mozilla has released patches to hundreds of millions of users to address these issues.

data.title: Earnings Scheduled For March 6, 2026
data.description: Before the market opens, several companies are expected to report their earnings. CLPS (NASDAQ: CLPS) is anticipated to reveal its first-quarter results. Tsakos Energy Navigation (NYSE: TEN) is expected to announce earnings of $1.23 per share with revenue around $172.92 million. Genesco (NYSE: GCO) is projected to report earnings of $3.73 per share on revenue of $787.74 million. Cohen & Co (AMEX: COHN) is also expected to report its fourth-quarter earnings. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bunker Hill Announces Completion of Reverse Stock Split
data.description: Bunker Hill Mining Corp. has successfully conducted a one-for-thirty-five reverse stock split of its common stock and preferred stock. The common shares will now trade on a post-consolidation basis on the TSX Venture Exchange starting from March 6, 2026. The company's stock is listed as TSX-V: BNKR and OTCQB: BHLL.

data.title: H World Group Limited Schedules Fourth Quarter and Full Year of 2025 Earnings Release on March 18, 2026
data.description: On March 6, 2026, H World Group Limited (NASDAQ: HTHT, HKEX: 1179), a significant player in the worldwide hotel sector, revealed its plans to disclose its unaudited financial outcomes for Q4 and the entire year of 2025 on March 18, 2026 (Hong Kong time). The data will be released post the trading hours of The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong Limited and before the U.S. market opens.

data.title: Donald Trump, Pam Bondi Hit With Investor Lawsuit Over TikTok Spinoff Approval
data.description: Two investors, Zhaocheng Anthony Tan and Garrett Reid, are suing President Donald Trump and Attorney General Pam Bondi over the approval of a deal that allows TikTok to operate as a separate American-owned entity. Tan has stakes in Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG) while Reid is a shareholder in Meta (NASDAQ: FB). The lawsuit was filed on Thursday, alleging that the deal violated a law that required TikTok's parent company, ByteDance, to divest from the app or face a U.S. ban. The lawsuit argues that the deal would enable ByteDance to retain control over TikTok, going against the TikTok Law's intent. Tan and Reid claim that the approval of the deal has caused financial harm to them as investors in rival companies, creating a legal obstacle to their financial recovery. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: New TelevisaUnivision and Harris Poll Highlights the Major Strategic Disconnect Today Between Elected Leaders and Hispanic Voters
data.description: In Miami, TelevisaUnivision revealed findings from a recent survey conducted by The Harris Poll of more than 500 registered Hispanic voters in Texas. The survey emphasized that affordability is the primary concern for 2026. The results showcased a significant disparity in priorities between elected officials and Hispanic voters on key issues. The survey was conducted during the competitive Texas primaries, underscoring a distinct misalignment: Latino swing voters are primarily concerned about affordability.

data.title: Aulumu Wins Two 2026 iF Design Awards, Showcasing Design-Led Innovation in Tech Accessories
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on March 6, 2026, Aulumu, a tech lifestyle brand, received prestigious recognition with two 2026 iF Design Awards. These awards highlight design excellence on a global scale and were given for the Aulumu Geometric Case for AirPods Pro and the Aulumu Mag. This showcases the brand's commitment to innovative and high-quality design, solidifying their position in the industry.

data.title: Gate of Heaven Cemetery Open House March 14-15 Offers Tour of New Chapel Mausoleum and Chance to Lock In 2025 Prices Before March 16
data.description: Join Catholic families across North Jersey at Gate of Heaven Cemetery & Mausoleum in East Hanover for a unique Open House Weekend on March 14-15, 2026, from 8:30 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. Explore the facilities and grounds during this special event.
